news.title: Restaurant Spectrum** in Amsterdam sluit eind mei 2026 - Entree Magazine
news.summary:
# Summary

**Spectrum**, a notable two-Michelin-star restaurant in Amsterdam, will close at the end of May 2026. This is significant for visitors planning fine dining experiences in Amsterdam, as it removes one of the city's prestigious high-end dining destinations from the culinary landscape.

news.title: Spectrum** van Sydney Schutte gaat sluiten; nieuw concept in Waldorf Astoria Amsterdam - De RestaurantKrant
news.summary:
# Summary

Sydney Schutte's two-Michelin-star restaurant Spectrum in Amsterdam is closing, with plans for a new culinary concept to open at the Waldorf Astoria Amsterdam instead. This is significant for visitors because it represents a major change in Amsterdam's fine dining scene—one of the city's most acclaimed restaurants will relocate to a prestigious hotel setting. Food enthusiasts visiting Amsterdam should note this transition if they were planning to dine at Spectrum's original location, though the chef's new venture at the Waldorf Astoria will likely remain a destination dining experience.

news.title: Goed en betaalbaar eten voor iedereen: de bouillon is een succesvolle Parijse restaurantformule die rond 1900 ook in Amsterdam aansloeg – en die is nu weer terug - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

The article discusses the return of "bouillon" restaurants to Amsterdam—a historic Parisian dining concept from around 1900 that emphasizes affordable, quality food for everyone. These casual eateries are making a comeback in the city after disappearing for decades. Visitors to Amsterdam would appreciate this trend as it offers good food at reasonable prices, combining historical charm with accessible dining.
